message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 0
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderHeight 1
skinparam participantBorderSpacing 0
skinparam participantBorderPadding 0
skinparam participantBorderMargin 0
skinparam participantBorderRadius 0
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderHeight 1
skinparam participantBorderSpacing 0
skinparam participantBorderPadding 0
skinparam participantBorderMargin 0

participant "User_App" as User_App
participant "WebRTC_GW" as WebRTC_GW
participant "SkyWay_Server" as SkyWay_Server
participant "Target_Peer" as Target_Peer

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /peers
{
  key: "YOUR_API_KEY",
  domain: "localhost",
  turn: true,
  peer_id: "media_caller"
}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  command_type: "PEERS_CREATE",
  params: {
    peer_id: "media_caller",
    token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11"
  }
}

User_App -> SkyWay_Server: CREATE PEER
SkyWay_Server --> User_App: SUCCESS
to bind peer id)

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: GET /peers/media_caller/events?
token=pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 200 OK
{
  "event": "OPEN",
  params: {
    peer_id: "media_caller",
    token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11"
  }
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /media
{
  is_video: true
}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  ip_v4: "172.16.1.106",
  media_id: "vi-9856040d-bd3e-4b33-b121-e3435842e5fc",
  port: 50003
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /media
{
  is_video: false
}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  ip_v4: "172.16.1.106",
  media_id: "au-a6c4c82c-9d9c-4e12-a52a-c927ec33793e",
  port: 50004
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /media/rtcp
{}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  "rtcp_id": "rc-970f2e5d-4da0-43e7-92b6-796678c104ad",
  "port": 50003,
  "ip_v4": "172.16.1.106"
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /media/rtcp
{}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  "rtcp_id": "rc-4044f658-dee5-4aac-a60a-ad133abb4f92",
  "port": 50004,
  "ip_v4": "172.16.1.106"
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: POST /media/connections
{
  peer_id: "media_caller",
  token: "pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11",
  target_id: "media_caller",
  constraints: {
    video: true,
    videoReceiveEnabled: true,
    audio: true,
    audioReceiveEnabled: true,
    video_params: {
      band_width: 1500,
      codec: "H264",
      media_id: "vi-9856040d-bd3e-4b33-b121-e3435842e5fc",
      rtcp_id: "rc-970f2e5d-4da0-43e7-92b6-796678c104ad",
      payload_type: 100
    },
    audio_params: {
      band_width: 1500,
      codec: "opus",
      media_id: "au-a6c4c82c-9d9c-4e12-a52a-c927ec33793e",
      rtcp_id: "rc-4044f658-dee5-4aac-a60a-ad133abb4f92",
      payload_type: 111
    }
  },
  redirect_params: {
    video: {
      ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
      port: 20000
    },
    video_rtcp: {
      ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
      port: 20010
    },
    audio: {
      ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
      port: 20001
    },
    audio_rtcp: {
      ip_v4: "172.16.1.105",
      port: 20011
    }
  }
}
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 201 Created
{
  command_type: "MEDIA_CONNECTION_CREATE",
  params: {
    media_connection_id: "mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a"
  }
}

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: GET /media/connections
/mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a/events
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 200 OK
{
  event: "READY"
}

loop
  User_App -> WebRTC_GW: send RTP Video to 172.16.1.106:50001
  WebRTC_GW -> Target_Peer: redirect Video with MediaStream
  User_App -> WebRTC_GW: send RTP Audio to 172.16.1.106:50002
  WebRTC_GW -> Target_Peer: redirect Audio with MediaStream
  User_App -> WebRTC_GW: send RTCP for Video to 172.16.1.106:50003
  WebRTC_GW -> Target_Peer: redirect RTCP with MediaStream
  User_App -> WebRTC_GW: send RTCP for Audio to 172.16.1.106:50004
  WebRTC_GW -> Target_Peer: redirect RTCP with MediaStream
  Target_Peer -> WebRTC_GW: recv Video with MediaStream
  WebRTC_GW -> User_App: redirect RTP Video to 172.16.1.105:20000
  Target_Peer -> WebRTC_GW: recv Audio with MediaStream
  WebRTC_GW -> User_App: redirect RTP Audio to 172.16.1.105:20001
  Target_Peer -> WebRTC_GW: recv RTCP for Video with MediaStream
  WebRTC_GW -> User_App: redirect RTCP for Video to 172.16.1.105:20010
  Target_Peer -> WebRTC_GW: recv RTCP for Audio with MediaStream
  WebRTC_GW -> User_App: redirect RTCP for Audio to 172.16.1.105:20011
end

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: Delete /media/connections
/mc-55f0b97c-77c7-42d7-b21b-a6a6bc3fee3a
WebRTC_GW -> Target_Peer: Close MediaStream
Target_Peer -> WebRTC_GW: erase Video object
and Audio object
WebRTC_GW --> User_App: 204 No Content

User_App -> WebRTC_GW: Delete /peers/media_caller?token=pt-be74737d-5762-401f-a526-01fa44d98a11
WebRTC_GW -> SkyWay_Server: disconnect
SkyWay_Server --> WebRTC_GW: 204 No Content

@enduml
```
